title: Archived Notice to Stakeholders: Consultation on Proposed Regulatory Amendments - Dental X-ray Equipment - Canada.ca
content:
## Archived Notice to Stakeholders: Consultation on Proposed Regulatory Amendments - Dental X-ray Equipment
The purpose of this notice is to inform stakeholders that Health Canada is seeking feedback on proposed amendments to the Radiation Emitting Devices Regulations (Dental X-ray equipment) . These proposed regulatory amendments were pre-published in Canada Gazette , Part I on June 18, 2016 for a 75-day comment period, and would apply to dental X-ray equipment manufactured for sale, re-sale, import or lease in Canada. While the existing regulations are protective of health, they are no longer aligned with the current international standards of the International Electrotechnical Commission (IEC), which reflect the latest radiation safety requirements of dental x-ray equipment.  The proposed amendments aim to strengthen Canada’s radiation safety requirements on both existing and new dental X-ray technologies.
This consultation is open for comment from June 18, 2016 to September 1, 2016.
To access and comment on the draft regulations, please visit the Canada Gazette , Part I .

## For More Information
To participate in the consultation, please see the link above.
For general questions and concerns, please contact the Consumer and Clinical Radiation Protection Bureau:
By email at: ccrpb-pcrpcc@hc-sc.gc.ca
Or by mail through the following address:
Consumer and Clinical Radiation Protection Bureau Environmental and Radiation Health Sciences Directorate 775 Brookfield Road (AL 6301A) Ottawa, Ontario K1A 1C1 Canada
